meta.purpose: official 5s eval-timeout re-judge of the already-generated 400 .mjs (serving-free)
meta.eval_node: qwen-mounted node v20.20.2 (SAME node the run's eval used via dexec_plain->container PATH); isolates ONLY the eval-timeout variable 10s->5s
meta.conservative_rule: any sample exceeding 5s (TimeoutExpired) => case all_pass=False (official cannot match a timed-out sample)

cases.note: GENUINE >5s per-sample cost (serial: 5s fail, 10s pass) -> official-5s penalty

cases.error_5s: TimeoutExpired@5s side=oracle cmd=['docker', 'exec', 'rj5-deepdiff-test6', '/workspace/dataset/test6_executable', '--a', '{"array": [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]}', '--b', '{"level1": {"level2": {"level3": "deep"}}}', '--c', '{"config": {"debug": false, "port": 8080}}', '--d', '{"data": null, "flag": true}', '--e', '{"users": [{"id": 1, "name": "Alice"}]}']

cases.note: GENUINE >5s per-sample cost (serial: 5s fail, 10s pass) -> official-5s penalty
